subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above all created things and the conditions of contingent beings, befitteth the threshold of Him Who is the Object of all desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ظهورات ممکنات و شئونات کائنات فناء باب حضرت مقصودیرا لایق و سزاست
subcodes.subjects: @Seal of the Prophets, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @station of the Manifestation of God, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement
